report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#440-444) and Newsletter v41 covering Liberation Day +1yr tariff anniversary (F&G crashes to 9), Impermanent Loss guide launch (67% V3 LPs underwater), Hyperliquid dominance (70% perp DEX share, $4.9B TVL), CLARITY Act markup delay + GENIUS Act Treasury rules, and Drift $285M aftermath. 2 new social card SVGs created (Liberation Day + Fear returns, IL + Hyperliquid combo). Content calendar extends through Apr 24 across v41 cycle.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #440: Liberation Day Anniversary + F&G 9 — 3-tweet thread: tariffs vs crypto 1-year recap, IBIT $8.4B Q1, sub-15 F&G historical returns (+18%/+72%/+114%), fear-greed tool CTA (Fri Apr 18, 2PM ET)

Tweet #441: Impermanent Loss Guide Launch — 3-tweet educational thread: 67% V3 LPs underwater, IL formula (2x = -5.7%), concentrated liquidity double-edged sword, 5 mitigation strategies (Sat Apr 19, 11AM ET)
Tweet #442: Hyperliquid Dominance — 2-tweet data thread: 70% perp DEX share, $4.9B TVL, $9B+ daily vol, HYPE $35 (#16 CoinGecko), 97% fee buybacks, guide CTA (Mon Apr 21, 3PM ET)

Tweet #443: CLARITY Act + GENIUS Act Update — 3-tweet news thread: markup pushed back, yield compromise (banned on balances/allowed on activities), 4-way deadlock, GENIUS Act Treasury 60-day comment period, $316B stablecoin ATH (Wed Apr 23, 2PM ET)

Tweet #444: Drift Aftermath + Solana DeFi — 2-tweet thread: $285M exploit week-later, SOL $78 (-11% weekly), DEX volumes -40% YTD, DPRK attribution, CCTP laundering vector, audit guide CTA (Thu Apr 24, 1PM ET)

Newsletter v41: 'One Year of Tariffs, One Week of Extreme Fear' — Market Pulse (BTC $66,868, F&G 9, market cap $2.38T, stablecoins $316B ATH, IBIT $8.4B Q1), New on degen0x (IL guide + Hyperliquid guide + Drift analysis + 3 exchange reviews), Worth Reading (CLARITY Act + Liberation Day anniversary), Degen Corner (sub-15 F&G returns, institutional divergence, stablecoin dry powder)
Discord/Telegram: New Guides announcement (Fri Apr 18, 5PM ET) + F&G Extreme Fear alert (Mon Apr 21, 1PM ET)
Total tweets all-time: 444 (5 new this cycle), content scheduled Apr 18-24

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: NEW CONTENT SINCE LAST COMMUNITY REPORT (v7): 2 new learn guides — Impermanent Loss & Liquidity Providing (973 lines, IL formula, concentrated LP risks, 5 mitigation strategies) + Hyperliquid Perp DEX Trading (1004 lines, HyperBFT, HYPE tokenomics, 150+ markets). 5 pages promoted to published (Gemini, Bitget, Gate.io, Hyperliquid reviews + business crypto cards). Total published: 638. Learn page count: 92 in workspace.

F&G CRASHES TO 9 — DEEPEST EXTREME FEAR: Dropped from 12 yesterday to 9 today, near the deepest extreme fear reading since FTX collapse. Liberation Day 1-year anniversary compounding macro anxiety. Supreme Court tariff ruling ($166B refunds) adding economic uncertainty. Every sustained sub-15 window since 2018 preceded: 30d +18%, 90d +72%, 180d +114% median returns.

LIBERATION DAY ANNIVERSARY NARRATIVE: One year since sweeping tariffs — BTC survived 16% flash crash, recovered in 47 days. Supreme Court struck down original tariffs as unconstitutional. Crypto proved resilient while traditional markets had 'most volatile year in history'. Strong content angle for social engagement.

REGULATORY WINDOW NARROWING: CLARITY Act market structure markup pushed beyond late April. GENIUS Act (signed Jul 2025) Treasury now proposing implementation rules with 60-day comment period. Stablecoin yield compromise: banned on balances, allowed on activities. Missing May Senate deadline = dead before midterms. Dual regulatory tracks create sustained search demand.

INSTITUTIONAL DIVERGENCE DEEPENS: IBIT absorbed $8.4B of $18.7B total BTC ETF inflows in Q1 2026 (45% market share). Daily inflows frequently exceeded $500M at peaks. Retail F&G at 9 while institutions accumulate aggressively. Stablecoin supply at $316B ATH — capital preservation positioning, not exit.

DRIFT AFTERMATH WEEK 2: SOL dropped to $78 (-11% weekly), Solana DEX volumes -40% since January. DPRK attribution confirmed. CCTP cross-chain laundering vector exposed. DeFi confidence test ongoing. Our Drift analysis page and audit guide are capturing sustained search demand from the aftermath.

Right: Historical returns panel with 3 graduated green cards (30d +18%/90d +72%/180d +114%), 4 context pills (F&G 9, Liberation Day, IBIT $8.4B, CLARITY Act), insight box on sub-15 recovery patterns. degen0x glass-morphism palette)
